summary: Stabilize Fabric v1.7.0 without new features and narrow AI client scope from 6 to 3 (Claude / Codex / Cursor). Two-release plan: 1.7.1 deprecation-only (~3 days) + 1.8.0 stabilization (~10-14 days, ~950 LoC). 27 recommendations + 5 deferrals across 36 decisions. Pre-plan grill-me closed 11 ambiguities (architecture: rule-sync module location / SKILL build-time derivation / task graph layering / branch strategy; tasks: R7 split + R11 migration; details: deep-merge / contract test infra / signal test / CI / changelog).

implementation_scope.objective: Build foundational infrastructure (Layer 0) — independent of any feature recommendation
implementation_scope.rationale: atomic-write helper / FabricError taxonomy / SKILL canonical source must precede all consumer tasks; defining them once avoids dependency duplication across 25+ feature tasks.
acceptance_criteria: atomic-write helper exports atomicWriteText / atomicWriteJson / createLedgerWriteQueue with optional fsync flag
FabricError base + 5 sub-trees (Config/Rule/IO/MCP/Init); actionHint required at construction; httpStatus on sub-tree default + override
SKILL build script emits two committed SKILL.md files matching outputName=fabric-init for both Claude and Codex
All Layer 0 modules have unit tests
implementation_scope.change_summary: ~280 LoC new code. 6 task nodes (T-R7.1 / T-R11.1 / T-R20.1 / T-R20.2 / T-R20.3 / migration-doc skeleton).

implementation_scope.objective: Service-layer foundation (Layer 1) — orchestrators and contract collectors that consumers depend on
implementation_scope.rationale: rule-sync orchestrator (R28 framework), ledger queue wiring (R7.2), and _error.ts collapse (R11.2) must land before tool handlers / startup / doctor are wired in Layer 2.
target_files: packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts (delete writeJsonAtomically at 1556-1560, swap to shared)
packages/server/src/api/_error.ts (remove 3 string-prefix matches; swap to FabricError adapter)
acceptance_criteria: All ledger writers route through createLedgerWriteQueue (single-import change at event-ledger.ts:35)
_error.ts has zero string-prefix matches; PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT_ROOT / HUMAN_LOCK_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND / LEDGER_ENTRY_NOT_FOUND now thrown as typed FabricError descendants
rule-sync.ts exports stable contract; unit-tested with mocked filesystem
Existing tests still pass without behavioral change
implementation_scope.change_summary: ~150 LoC new + ~80 LoC migration. 5 task nodes.

implementation_scope.objective: Client narrowing — 6 → 3 (FIRST P0 consumer task, must precede all schema/contract work)
implementation_scope.rationale: Per Gemini G4: don't write snapshot tests for clients about to die. Mechanical change to 15 files via ClientKind typed pivot.
acceptance_criteria: grep -ri 'windsurf|rooCode|geminiCLI' packages/*/src returns 0 hits
ClientKind type narrowed to 'claude' | 'codex' | 'cursor'
fixtures/clientScope test prevents reintroduction
pnpm test green
User configs with retired keys still parse via zod passthrough (no hard error) — 1.7.1 deprecation warning surfaces them

implementation_scope.rationale: Core stability work consuming Layer 0/1 primitives: ledger durability, signal handlers, lockfile, MCP config path, schema contract tests, --reapply preservation, rule-change observability.
target_files: packages/server/src/index.ts (signal handlers SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP + InFlightTracker + fsyncSync on shutdown)
packages/cli/src/config/json.ts (rewrite Claude config to .mcp.json + ~/.claude.json with --scope flag + interactive prompt + deep-merge via lodash.merge)
packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts (mcp_config_in_wrong_file check + --fix removes settings.json fabric entry)
packages/server/src/tools/*.ts (annotations: readOnlyHint / idempotentHint / destructiveHint / openWorldHint / title)
packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts (--reapply: preserve events.jsonl + skip meta regen if rules exist)
packages/server/src/index.ts (startup full scan via ensureRulesFresh mode:full)
packages/server/src/http.ts (chokidar glob extends to .fabric/rules/**/*.md; cache invalidate only)
acceptance_criteria: R2: tail-tolerant readEventLedger surfaces LedgerWarning[]; doctor 'event_ledger_partial_write' fixable
R3: vitest spawns server, sends SIGTERM, asserts exit code 0 within 5s + ledger fully fsynced (Linux/macOS only; Windows skip)
R4: stale lock detected via process.kill(pid,0) ESRCH path; --force override; doctor preflight reports
R5: project-scope .mcp.json merged via lodash.merge; settings.json fabric entry auto-removed by --fix; mcp_config_migrated ledger event
R6+R10 (paired commit): tool schemas exported; per-tool snapshot tests + annotations land together (avoid Gemini G6 churn)
R17: --reapply preserves events.jsonl byte-identically; agents.meta.json regen skipped when rules already exist
R28: ensureRulesFresh on every MCP entry detects mtime change → granular ledger events with 500ms debounce; structured warnings have typed code + file:line + action_hint
implementation_scope.change_summary: ~600 LoC across 9 P0 recommendations. ~14 task nodes (R1 separate above + R7.5-8 below).

implementation_scope.rationale: Lower-priority but in-cycle improvements: dead code removal, bootstrap routing, typed error consumers, payload guard, knip, doctor checks, SKILL parity, watcher extension.
target_files: packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts (writeDefaultBootstrap → buildFabricBootstrapGuide; 4 doctor checks: content_ref_missing reclassify / rules_dir_unindexed / stable_id_collision / claude_skill_legacy_path)
Action hints on all doctor checks (content scan)
P1 raw→atomic migrations: init.ts:570/573/576/583, bootstrap-guide.ts:41, hooks.ts:105/147/158/162
packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts (write Claude SKILL to .claude/skills/fabric-init/ instead of agents-md-init/)
acceptance_criteria: R8: 7 dead helpers + fab_get_rules removed; knip reports zero unused exports
R9: doctor --fix produces same bootstrap as fab init
R11.3-4: RuleError used by R28 sync paths; MCPError used by R12 payload guard
R12: payload guard at MCP transport layer; configurable via fabric.config.json
R13: knip run in lint step; zero baseline; CI fails on new dead code
R14-19,R25: 6 doctor improvements landed; action_hint on every check message
R20: SKILL build emits parity content for Claude+Codex; outputName=fabric-init; legacy .claude/skills/agents-md-init/ migrated by doctor --fix
R23 (subsumed by R28): watcher glob extended
implementation_scope.change_summary: ~350 LoC across 12 P1 recommendations. ~17 task nodes (incl. T-R7.5-8, T-R20.1-6, T-R11.3-4).

implementation_scope.rationale: Two-step ship per D2: 1.7.1 lets users see deprecation warnings BEFORE 1.8.0 removes the code. Three small, low-risk fixes also bundled.
target_files: packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts (legacy_client_path_present check + --fix auto-strip; doctor section headers via t())
acceptance_criteria: R0: doctor warns on clientPaths.{windsurf,rooCode,geminiCLI}; --fix strips them; legacy_client_path_present ledger event
R18: doctor section headers go through t() (no jarring English mid-zh-CN output)
R24: init_context_missing message has action_hint pointing to Claude/Codex skill invocation
Cherry-pick to release/v1.7.1 branch; PR to main; tag v1.7.1; ~3 days work
implementation_scope.change_summary: ~80 LoC across 3 small fixes. 3 task nodes (R0 / R18 / R24).

implementation_scope.rationale: After all Layer 2 tasks merge to feature branch, package release.
target_files: docs/migration-1.8.md (final content: 客户端范围变更 / 配置迁移 / --reapply 行为 / doctor 新检查 / FAQ)
acceptance_criteria: release/v1.8.0-stabilization → main mega-PR with commit-per-task history
All 24 1.8.0 recommendations landed (P0 + P1)
Tag v1.8.0; CHANGELOG comprehensive

code_anchors.significance: ledger writer single point — line 35 fs.appendFile to be wrapped with createLedgerWriteQueue
SSE incremental reader — already implements tail tolerance via state.eventLedgerRemainder; pattern to lift into readEventLedger
stdio server start — no signal handlers; matches Claude Code #15945 zombie pattern
writes mcpServers.fabric to .claude/settings.json (NONCOMPLIANT) instead of .mcp.json; line 59 raw fs.writeFile (P1 atomic candidate, must land before R5)
string-prefix HTTP status mapping — 3 sites become typed FabricError throws
init scaffold raw writes (P1 atomic) / 7 dead helpers (R8) / writeJsonAtomically duplicate (delete) / --reapply destructive truncation (R17 fix)
chokidar watcher — extend glob to .fabric/rules/**/*.md (D25); watcher only invalidates cache, never writes
content_ref_missing misclassified (R14) / writeDefaultBootstrap silent stub (R9) / atomic write keeper / ensureEventLedger
ContextCache singleton — invalidate('file_watch') consumed by R28 watcher path
SKILL template paths — Claude target changes from agents-md-init → fabric-init (R20)
3 MCP tool entry points — each gets ensureRulesFresh() at top (R28) + annotations (R10) + schema export (R6)
revision-hash precise change detection / atomic writers / Map.set last-wins on duplicate ids (R16) / append fan-out callsites

key_findings: Claude Code MCP config emitted to wrong file (.claude/settings.json instead of .mcp.json / ~/.claude.json) — silent today, will break when Claude tightens MCP loading
MCP server lacks signal handlers (SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP) — direct hit on Claude Code #15945 zombie pattern
events.jsonl uses raw fs.appendFile with no fsync, no rotation, no tail-tolerance on full read; SSE incremental reader already has tail-tolerance pattern to lift
Tool input/output Zod schemas live inline in tools/*.ts, not exported, no contract tests — unmitigated #1 MCP failure category (38% schema drift)
fab init --reapply silently truncates events.jsonl AND resets agents.meta.json to L0 stub — data-loss bug
fab serve cacheWatcher does NOT watch .fabric/rules/*.md — manual rule edits invisible to AI until doctor --fix
Codex SKILL is 27 lines vs Claude SKILL's 86 lines — brand-quality gap for the 'narrow to 3' commitment
6→3 client narrowing scope = 15 files, ClientKind is the typed pivot, mechanical and small-blast-radius
7 dead helper functions in init.ts:1383-1554 (~170 LoC); fab_get_rules tool exists but never registered
Gemini cross-verification surfaced 4 coupling bugs: drain-without-fsync paradox; stale-lock deadlock; snapshot↔annotation release coupling; ledger truncate vs OS-buffered last event
AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md drift problem doesn't apply — Fabric uses MCP resource (single source of truth), not per-client root files
Total stabilization budget ≈ 950 LoC across 4 independent change buckets (ledger / signal / lockfile / atomic-write helper + migration), all at I/O boundary — zero business-logic risk
decision_context: Two-release strategy: 1.7.1 deprecation-only (~3 days) + 1.8.0 stabilization (~10-14 days). Cherry-pick 1.7.1 from feature branch (D2)
Single feature branch release/v1.8.0-stabilization from main; mega-PR with commit-per-task history (Q9)
Task graph organized Infrastructure-first (Layer 0 → Layer 1 → Layer 2 → Layer 3) with release-tag metadata, NOT by recommendation number or release phase (Q9)
Re-sequence per Gemini G4+G5: 6→3 narrowing FIRST, then atomic-write helper, then ledger fix, then signal handlers (D4)
Signal handler MUST fsyncSync on ledger fd before exit (Gemini G1 — drain-without-fsync paradox)
PID lockfile MUST include process.kill(pid,0) liveness check + stale recovery (Gemini G2)
R6 (schema snapshots) + R10 (annotations) MUST ship in same commit (Gemini G6 — avoid 100% snapshot churn)

.mcp.json: --scope project|user CLI flag + interactive prompt; default project scope (D11); deep-merge via lodash.merge (D12, Q6); doctor --fix auto-removes stale settings.json fabric entry + writes mcp_config_migrated event (D13)
--reapply fix: preserve events.jsonl + skip agents.meta.json regen if rules already exist; no new --reset command (D14)

R20 SKILL: build-time derivation from canonical templates/skill-source/fabric-init/; outputName UNIFIED to fabric-init for both Claude and Codex; legacy .claude/skills/agents-md-init/ migrated by doctor --fix; CI contract test prevents source/artifact drift (Q5 + user override)

R28 sync orchestrator: new packages/server/src/services/rule-sync.ts; ensureRulesFresh() called at every MCP tool entry + startup full scan + doctor --fix; watcher downgraded to cache invalidation only; 500ms debounce in rule-sync (D25, Q4)

R11 typed errors: hybrid incremental migration; FabricError base + 5 sub-trees (Config/Rule/IO/MCP/Init) in packages/shared/src/errors/; actionHint REQUIRED at construction; httpStatus default on sub-tree + override; only ~10 consumed-error throws migrated, ~34 generic throws stay as-is (D31, Q3)
R7 atomic-write: hand-rolled createLedgerWriteQueue (no `atomically` dep); fsync?: boolean opt flag; T-R7.6 (json.ts/toml.ts) MUST land before R5 Claude config rewrite (Q2)
Test strategy: implementation + tests in SAME commit for ALL items, P0 and P1, TDD-style (D33)
Knip: knip.config.ts; zero-baseline; integrated into pnpm lint (D35, Q10)
Signal handler test: vitest + child_process.spawn real signal, Linux/macOS only, Windows skip (Q8)

Contract test snapshots: packages/server/__tests__/__snapshots__/tool-contracts/ + packages/cli/__tests__/__snapshots__/client-configs/; vitest toMatchSnapshot; CI failure includes pnpm test -u hint (Q7)
Migration doc: docs/migration-1.8.md, fixed 5 sections (客户端范围变更 / 配置迁移 / --reapply 行为 / doctor 新检查 / FAQ); CHANGELOG keep-a-changelog (Q11)

Deferred to 1.9.0: dashboard DoctorReport type lift (D8); JsonClientConfigWriter format-split (D1); init.ts decomposition (D3); tsconfig hardening (D4); R21 orphan-annotations / R22 invalid-id warnings (D30); R26 full server-side i18n (D5)
